title: buildah inside of a podman container runs in rootless mode
body:
It is running as root but still puts its content in /root/.local ...

It should be using /var/lib/containers/.

comments.body: is the podman container using user namespaces?

Nope 
```
cat ~/Dockerfile.buildah 
FROM fedora

RUN dnf -y install buildah; dnf -y clean all
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/buildah"]
WORKDIR /root

# podman build -t buildah-ctr -f Dockerfile.buildah .
# podman run buildah-ctr --debug --storage-driver vfs pull alpine 2>&1 | grep root
time="2019-01-18T20:25:07Z" level=debug msg="parsed reference into \"[vfs@/root/.local/share/containers/storage+/run/user/0]docker.io/library/alpine:latest\""
```
